steps.title: Determine what the blank must mean in context
steps.content: The sentence says Garza "is ______ direct experience, drawing from memories of her childhood in Texas or details of her current surroundings in California." The participial phrase after the comma explains the blank: Garza actively draws from her lived experiences to make art. The blank must describe her relationship to direct experience as its source and motivating force.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Test each choice in "she is ______ direct experience":
  • Choice A — 'complimented by': Complimented by means praised or flattered by. Direct experience is not an external agent that praises Garza — this misrepresents the relationship entirely. ✗
  • Choice B — 'uncertain about': Uncertain about means doubtful of. If Garza doubted her own direct experiences, she could not reliably draw from childhood memories or current surroundings as the passage says she does. ✗
  • Choice C — 'unbothered by': Unbothered by means indifferent to. This directly contradicts the passage, which shows Garza actively incorporating her experiences into her art — she is clearly not indifferent to them. ✗
  • Choice D — 'inspired by': Inspired by means motivated and influenced by. Garza draws from her memories and surroundings as the creative fuel for her work, which is precisely what "inspired by direct experience" means. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
